body: Dev, great connecting with you earlier this week — I've been thinking more about what you shared on [GreenPulse](greenpulse.io)'s grid-edge monitoring stack and I think the timing here is genuinely interesting given where we're deploying capital at [Halfway Capital](halfway.vc) right now. One thing I want to flag: as of today, [Maya Chen](people/maya-chen) is still our General Partner leading climate infrastructure diligence, so I'll want to loop her in before we move toward any formal partner meeting. That said, I don't want to slow the conversation down on our end — if you can share the deck and any early pilot data this week, I can get her eyes on it quickly. The defensibility of the sensor fusion layer is the piece I'll need her to pressure-test, so the more technical depth you can include there the better. Looking forward to keeping this moving.
